recommendations.title: Buy Denver Nuggets to win
recommendations.reason: Recommendation: buy Denver Nuggets on the moneyline. They sit in the strongest short-favorite zone on the board, which usually offers one of the better balances between win probability and price discipline. The market is backing them without pushing the number into a range where the cost becomes harder to justify.
